{{Quote|I saw Mitsh and Trenrel fall, unmoving and instantly covered by a swarming mound of chittering, insect-like creatures.|A travel journal entry|<ref name="10HSTG">{{SonyCite|url=content.jsp?page=Travel%20Guide|text=10 Hot Spots Travel Guide}}</ref>}}
'''Fynocks''' were [[Bird/Legends|avian]] creatures that could be domesticated. They appeared as exotic birds with [[Snake/Legends|snake]] tails. Fynocks lived on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Talus/Legends|Talus]] and were the [[Atmosphere/Legends|atmospheric]] cousins of the [[Vacuum/Legends|vacuum]]-traversing [[Mynock/Legends|mynock]].

A subspecies was the jungle fynock that lived in dense jungles of Talus.<ref name="TCSWE181" />

==History==
{{Quote|The attack was sudden and without warning. Several scuttling creatures overran our camp while large flying creatures dove at us from above.|A travel journal entry|<ref name="10HSTG" />}}
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], a pack of giant fynocks lived in a [[Giant Fynock Cave|cave]] on the planet Talus.<ref name="SWG:GFC">{{SWGcite|exp=AED|type=poi|Giant Fynock Cave|Talus}}</ref> A group of travelers, including [[Mitsh]], [[Trenrel]], [[Yill'uop]], [[Heitop]] and [[Frann]], once sought shelter from a storm inside this cave. They were attacked by the fynocks and all but one died in the attack.<ref name="10HSTG" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:Fynock_concept_art.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Fynocks appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref>

''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' erroneously describes fynocks as small insects that traveled in swarms.<ref name="TCSWE300">{{CSWECite|I|300|fynock}}</ref>
